faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Castle Hill, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Castle Hill properties commonly experience pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Pavement ants typically nest in cracks along sidewalks and foundations, while carpenter ants may infest older wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment for your Castle Hill property.
